Home / Calculators / Business Valuation Calculator

Business Valuation Calculator

Estimate the market value of your small business.

What is Business Valuation Calculator?

Whether you are planning to sell your business, bring in investors, or simply want to know what you have built, understanding your company's market value is essential. This calculator uses the earnings multiple method — the most common small business valuation approach — to give you a fast, reliable estimate.

How to Use This Tool

1. Enter your business's annual net profit. 2. Input the standard industry multiple for your sector (typically 2–5x for small businesses). 3. Click calculate to get your estimated valuation.

💡 Pro Tip: Different industries carry very different multiples. A SaaS business might sell for 8–12x profit while a local restaurant might fetch only 2–3x. Research your specific industry multiple before entering it here for the most accurate result!
